claim_boundary: This workplan remains an internal buyer-safe scaffold only. It does not create legal advice, financial advice, binding terms, compliance certification, production validation, automated verdicts, free-pilot commitments, autonomous client action, truth validation, or hidden-mechanism claims.
closeout_note: Buyer Artifact Simulator + Pilot Readiness Score complete as an internal buyer-safe scaffold.
core_goal: Stress-test intake/routing with fake buyer submissions and score whether a real buyer pilot should proceed, be rescoped, require redaction, require counsel/CPA, or be declined.
parked_reason: Completed at 100.0%; parked before registering Claim Logic + Negation-Aware Safety Scanner.

phases.completion_note: Buyer artifact simulator, synthetic fixture artifacts, manifest, documentation, and test report created.
phases.goal: Generate synthetic buyer artifact cases to stress-test the intake/routing system.

phases.completion_note: Pilot readiness score tool, docs, policy, fixture cases, and fixture results created.
phases.goal: Score whether a buyer pilot is ready to accept.

phases.completion_note: Red-team buyer requests, safe responses, negation-aware test harness, and passing test results completed.
phases.goal: Create bad buyer requests and safe redirect/refusal responses.

phases.completion_note: Client folder lockdown rules, folder policy checker, compliant fixture project, and policy report completed after exact suffix-matching repair.
phases.goal: Define what can and cannot live in each client project folder.

phases.completion_note: Evidence ledger schema, tool, clean sample JSONL ledger, and summary report completed after tests passed.
phases.goal: Create an audit ledger for pilot artifacts and decisions.

phases.completion_note: Delivery packet generator, template, sample packet, sample project, and test report completed after affirmative-claim scan passed.
phases.goal: Generate a client-facing delivery packet from a completed safe project folder.

phases.completion_note: Targeted audit and closeout completed with blunt overclaim scan suspended after repeated false positives on non-claim boundary language.
phases.goal: Audit simulator/readiness system and close only when fixtures pass, boundaries are preserved, and no prohibited claims are introduced.

professional_threshold: If procurement, contract terms, paid pilot, licensing, exclusivity, acquisition, IP assignment, data transfer, or money movement becomes real, engage qualified legal and CPA support before proceeding alone.
purpose: Create a safe synthetic test layer and pilot readiness gate before real buyer data arrives.
